title: AdaskoTheBeAsT.Typewriter configuration
description: Schema for typewriter.json, typewriter.config.json, and .typewriterrc.json configuration files used by AdaskoTheBeAsT.Typewriter. See https://github.com/AdaskoTheBeAsT/Typewriter#-configuration-typewriterjson for full documentation.

$schema.description: URL of this JSON Schema, used by editors for validation and autocompletion.

templates.description: Glob patterns used to discover templates.

inputExtensions.description: File extensions that trigger 'typewriter watch' and editor generate-on-save. The leading dot is optional.

defaultTargetFramework.description: Target framework moniker used when a project multi-targets (e.g. 'net10.0').

output.description: Formatting and code-generation options for generated files.

newline.description: Line endings used in generated files.

encoding.description: File encoding for generated files. The original Typewriter emitted a BOM by default; set 'utf-8-bom' for byte-identical output.

writeOnlyWhenChanged.description: Skip disk writes when content is unchanged (keeps file watchers and HMR calm).

fileNameConvention.description: Naming convention applied to generated output file names.

strictNull.description: Render nullable types as 'T | null'. Templates can override via settings.DisableStrictNullGeneration().

indentStyle.description: Re-indent generated output. The rendered indent unit is detected automatically.

indentSize.description: Target indent width used when indentStyle is 'space'.

insertFinalNewline.description: Ensure generated files end with a single trailing newline.

trimTrailingWhitespace.description: Strip trailing spaces and tabs from every generated line.

quoteStyle.description: Default string literal character for generated defaults. settings.UseStringLiteralCharacter(...) in a template wins.

dateType.description: TypeScript type used for DateTime, DateTimeOffset, and date-time-like NodaTime values. settings.UseDateType(...) wins.

dateInitializer.description: TypeScript initializer used for non-null date-time defaults. settings.UseDateInitializer(...) wins.

dateOnlyType.description: TypeScript type used for DateOnly, NodaTime.LocalDate, and NodaTime.OffsetDate. settings.UseDateOnlyType(...) wins.

dateOnlyInitializer.description: TypeScript initializer used for non-null date-only defaults. settings.UseDateOnlyInitializer(...) wins.

timeOnlyType.description: TypeScript type used for TimeOnly, NodaTime.LocalTime, and NodaTime.OffsetTime. settings.UseTimeOnlyType(...) wins.

timeOnlyInitializer.description: TypeScript initializer used for non-null time-only defaults. settings.UseTimeOnlyInitializer(...) wins.

guidType.description: TypeScript type used for C# Guid. Set to 'uuid', 'UUID', or a branded alias with settings.UseGuidType(...) or config.

decimalType.description: TypeScript type used for C# decimal. settings.UseDecimalType(...) in a template wins.

failOnWarning.description: Treat warnings as failures (great for CI).
